sub_modules.conv3d_coord_update_comb: Pure-combinational coordinate sequencer for x/y/z raster-scan position updates and end-of-volume detection.
sub_modules.conv3d_valid_region_comb: Pure-combinational valid-padding region detector for stride-1 valid 3D convolution windows.
sub_modules.conv3d_kernel_activity_comb: Pure-combinational reduction logic that detects whether any flattened kernel coefficient is nonzero.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_formatter_comb: Pure-combinational flattened window formatter used as the lightweight window-generation interface between buffering/control and MAC logic.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac_array_comb: Pure-combinational multiply-accumulate array over the flattened 3D window and flattened kernel, with output truncation to the requested interface width.
